answer:
<think> The show Beauty and the Geek was first aired in the UK on E4, which is a channel that is part of the Channel 4 network. The show was a format that was successful in the US, and the UK version had a voiceover by David Mitchell, who is known for his work on the British sitcom Peep Show. Peep Show was broadcast on Channel 4. Therefore, I can infer that the year Peep Show ended its run on Channel 4 is likely the same year the UK version of Beauty and the Geek was first aired, as the voiceover for Beauty and the Geek was provided by David Mitchell, who was associated with Peep Show. Since Beauty and the Geek first aired in 2006, I can deduce that Peep Show likely ended its run around the same time. I know that Peep Show started in 2003, so if it ended around the same time as Beauty and the Geek started, it would have ended in 2006. Therefore, Peep Show likely ended in 2006. </think>
<answer> 2006 </answer>
